calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt, For An Award Of Sanctions And For A Stay Of The Action Nunc Pro Tunc; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Apr-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTs LAUREN GOLDBOSS,and SHANNON CALHOUN's Motion On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt, For An Award Of Sanctions And For A Stay Of The Action Nunc Pro Tunc.

Respondents Lauren Goldboss and Shannon Calhoun's OSC re contempt, for an award of sanctions, and for a stay of the action nunc pro tunc is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Arb For Stay And Attorneys Fees

Motion To Compel Arb For Stay And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Maria Kao, Esq. (415) 402-2700 BRISCOE IVESTER & BAZEL LLP for Plaintiff.
Stephen Williams, Esq. 415-292-3656 for Defendant (In-person)

ARGUED. Petitioner contests and presents arguments. Mr. Williams responds and presents argument. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - RESPONDENTs LAUREN GOLDBOSS,and SHANNON CALHOUN's Motion To Compel Arb For Stay And Attorneys Fees.

Respondents Lauren Goldboss and Shannon Calhoun's motion to compel arbitration and stay.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, an Order Granting Respondents' Motion to Compel Arbitration and for an Award of sanctions is signed. (see scanned order for details)
